artPrompt: An ordinary human citizen stands on a tidy front lawn clutching a blank clipboard to their chest, brow furrowed with anxious civic worry, peering over a white picket fence at something offscreen in warm golden afternoon light. A crowd of restless townsfolk and a casserole table haze in the leafy-green background. Intimate, characterful film-still framing with deep small-town depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Concerned Neighbor
text: When Concerned Neighbor enters the battlefield, you gain 2 life if an opponent controls more creatures than you. (You're worried, and worry is healthy in moderation.)
flavorText: "I'm not saying it's a problem. I'm saying we should have a meeting about whether it's a problem."
